# Project Status

This file was reset on extraction into the **Line-Bundle Comparison Iso**
subproject. The parent's accumulated iteration narrative (iter-099…iter-303,
much of it about files now out of scope) was dropped; this subproject's own
`archon` run regenerates status as it makes progress. Per-iter narrative lives
in `iter/iter-NNN/review.md`; this file carries the cumulative Knowledge Base only.

Current scope and live state live in [`PROGRESS.md`](PROGRESS.md) and
[`STRATEGY.md`](STRATEGY.md). Summary:

- **Seeds:** `lem:pullback_tensor_iso_loctriv`, `lem:dual_isLocallyTrivial`,
  `thm:rel_pic_addcommgroup_via_tensorobj` (108-node cone).
- **Open targets (post iter-017):** TensorObjSubstrate.lean GREEN, 2 sorries —
  `exists_tensorObj_inverse` (L719, import-cycle, deferred) and `pullbackTensorMap_restrict`
  (decl L3144; residual `hcore2` at L3626). Steps (i) [iter-015], (ii) [iter-016 `sheafifyMap_δcomp_split`],
  and (iii)-a/b.1/b.2 [iter-017, the S1^h slide + prefix-cancel + slide-of-V] all CLOSED+spliced. **Residual
  = `hcore2` only:** the folded Sq3/Sq4 **presheaf** identity (D1′-level chase). Sq3/Sq4 are NOT built
  standalone (`sheafifyTensorUnitIso_comp`/`pullbackValIso_comp` are orphaned blueprint targets, merged
  into `hcore2`). `sheafificationCompPullback_comp_tail`/`_comp`/`_comp_natTrans`/`hδ` CLOSED iter-006.
  **DualInverse/SliceTransport.lean GREEN, 0 sorries — DUAL route CLOSED** (`sliceDualTransport` incl.
  left_inv/right_inv proved, axiom-clean). Full chain builds green together.
- **Stage:** prover.

## Knowledge Base

### Build-environment ceiling (iter-087 — INFRASTRUCTURE, not math)
- **`PresheafDualPullback.lean` is at the harness compute ceiling: a full cone build is ~28 min
  wall-clock (`sync_leanok duration_secs: 1657`) and the file carries `set_option maxHeartbeats
  12800000` + `backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false` (L771–772) + whnf-heavy comparator
  elaboration. On a 2 GB-RAM host this OOM-kills (`lake build` → Exit 137 = SIGKILL).** iter-087 was a
  TOTAL no-progress iter for exactly this reason: SOLO `prove` made **0 edits** across 3 attempts —
  every `lake build` was SIGKILLed BEFORE the FLANK goal (L1273) was reached; the prover's 900s
  idle-watchdog also fires on the silent (no-stdout) build. **The math (`pushforwardBetaUnitEpsAppOne`
  linchpin + FLANK close) was never attempted — do NOT misread iter-087 as a math STUCK or pivot to
  mathlib-analogist.** CURE before any further prover lane here: (a) pre-warm dependency oleans so only
  the leaf elaborates; (b) drive the goal via LSP `lean_goal` at L1273 against warm oleans instead of a
  silent `lake build`; (c) raise the lane idle-timeout above the ~28 min build, or give the host more
  RAM; (d) structurally, effort-break/refactor the FLANK sectionwise identity into its OWN small leaf
  module so it is reachable without re-elaborating the whole 12.8M-heartbeat file (same effort-break
  logic that closed S3 iter-083).

### Proof Patterns (reusable across targets)
- **Seam2 `trivialisation_telescope_assemble` CLOSED (iter-103): generic `[Category C]` 5-square ρ-cancellation cocycle, sorry-free, build EXIT 0 (8567 jobs).** Proof = `subst h1 h2 h3 h4 h5; simp only [Category.assoc, Iso.inv_hom_id_assoc]` (the four internal `ρ_k.inv ≫ ρ_k.hom` pairs cancel as `Iso.inv_hom_id_assoc`). Designated seam-confiner — applied to the concrete `SheafOfModules ≫` chain by `exact`/`refine`, NEVER `rw`/`ext`. **CONJUGATION DIRECTION (durable gotcha):** for `dU_k : O_{k-1} ⟶ O_k` the square is `dU_k = ρ_{k-1}.hom ≫ cV_k ≫ ρ_k.inv` — the `ρ.inv ≫ cV ≫ ρ.hom` direction is a TYPE ERROR (`P0 ⟶ P1` vs `O0 ⟶ O1`). Sibling of `dual_scp_assemble`/`unit_assemble`/`hcore_assemble`. **(c)-frontier env blocker:** `restrictIsoUnitOfLE_eq_restrict` (Seam-1 keystone, typed, `Iso.ext` done, `.hom` `restrictFunctorComp ↔ pullbackComp` chart-chase residual) + Seam3 section descent did NOT land — **LSP DEAD on TensorObjInverse (Broken pipe; only build `trace_state` works ≈1.5 min/step), so blind section-descent/chart-chase is infeasible in one session.** Restore LSP / leaf-split (iter-095 K1 pattern) BEFORE the next prove lane; do NOT grind blind.
- **RES2 `pullbackUnit_sheafify_reconcile` CLOSED + KEYSTONE (a) `dual_unit_iso_restrict_assemble` NOW SORRY-FREE (iter-102): TensorObjInverse dual cone 2→1, EXIT 0 (8567 jobs), all axiom-clean `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`.** iter-101 watch said ESCALATE RES2 (do NOT re-grind) → effort-breaker DECOMPOSED RES2 into L1+L2+helper and the prover found a CLEANER route than the blueprint's transpose/template-mirror prose. **(†)-FACTORISATION (transpose-free):** `p.hom = η_Y ; forget(pullbackValIso f 𝟙_X ; pullbackUnitIso f)`, built from already-proven `H1inv_app_eq_pullbackVal_restrict f 𝟙_X` + RES1 `forgetUnitRestrict_eq_pushforwardUnit f` (the two `restrictFunctorIsoPullback` legs cancel via `hqid`), capped by the NEW generic collapse. **L1 `pullbackValIso_unit_factor`** = unit instance of template `hpbv` (L647-653): `rw [pullbackValIso, Iso.trans_hom, Iso.symm_hom, Functor.mapIso_hom]; rfl` (RHS spelled `(asIso …counit).hom.app M₀` to match LHS). **NEW DURABLE GENERIC `adj_unit_counit_collapse`** (for `adj:L⊣R`, `g:L.obj P⟶B`: `L.map (adj.unit.app P ≫ R.map g) ≫ adj.counit.app B = g`): keyed `rw [counit.naturality]`/`left_triangle_components` FAILS (the `(L⋙R).obj P` vs `R.obj(L.obj P)` middle-object mismatch poisons the motive) → **homEquiv round-trip** `rw [show adj.unit.app P ≫ R.map g = adj.homEquiv P B g from (adj.homEquiv_unit P B g).symm]; exact (adj.homEquiv_counit P B _).symm.trans (Equiv.symm_apply_apply (adj.homEquiv P B) g)`. **`Adjunction.homEquiv_unit`/`homEquiv_counit` take `X Y f` EXPLICITLY in this Mathlib.** Other seam fixes (all in family): `(H1.app 𝟙).inv ≠ H1.inv.app 𝟙` for keyed rw → convert with `Iso.app_inv`; AVOID `← Functor.map_comp` (triggers `instances`-transparency type error) → merge via `← Functor.mapIso_inv/_hom`+`Iso.inv_hom_id`, split RHS by FORWARD `Functor.map_comp`; term-mode `congrArg (g ≫ ·) L2` crosses the `SheafOfModules ≫` seam where keyed `rw [L2]` misses the composite; `set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false` load-bearing on L2+target (comparator unfold ill-typed under `instances`). Sole remaining file sorry = (c) `trivialisation_restrict_compat` (L2660), gated/unblocked, 5-square telescope, planner-scheduled. Both review subagents clear, 0 must-fix (auditor: 5 decls clean, 3 set_options load-bearing, sorry honest, 3 stale comments L1146/L804/L2397-2398; lvb: 4 decls faithful, MAJOR = L2 prose/`\uses` stale vs realized route [flagged `% NOTE:` iter-102], minor = `adj_unit_counit_collapse` coverage gap).
- **RES1 `forgetUnitRestrict_eq_pushforwardUnit` CLOSED (iter-101): TensorObjInverse dual cone 3→2, EXIT 0, axiom-clean; keystone (a) now closed MODULO RES2 ONLY.** Winning recipe = **COLLAPSE AT THE MORPHISM LEVEL BEFORE SECTIONING** (the abstract left-adjoint `pullback` has NO sectionwise value — the prior section-first reduction was the wall). STEP 1: new generic helper `leftAdjointUniq_hom_app_homEquiv_symm` (`[Category C][Category D]`, ~L1564) — `(leftAdjointUniq adj1 adj2).hom.app x ≫ (adj2.homEquiv x e).symm g = (adj1.homEquiv x e).symm g` via `homEquiv_counit` (both sides) + `NatTrans.naturality` along `g` + **TERM-mode last step** `exact congrArg (F.map g ≫ ·) (Adjunction.leftAdjointUniq_hom_app_counit adj1 adj2 e)` (a keyed `rw [leftAdjointUniq_hom_app_counit]` fails "not type-correct under `instances` transparency"). With `RFIP f = leftAdjointUniq (restrictAdjunction f)(pullbackPushforwardAdjunction f)` (rfl) + `pullbackObjUnitToUnit φ = homEquiv.symm (unitToPushforwardObjUnit φ)` (rfl) the helper collapses `RFIP.app 𝟙_X ≫ pullbackUnitIso.hom` to the `restrictAdjunction`-transpose. STEP 2 (section): split `forget` over the composite **TERM-mode** `refine Eq.trans ((forget _).map_comp _ _) ?_` (keyed `rw [map_comp]` chokes on the `SheafOfModules ≫` seam); then sectionwise `erw [pushforward_map_app_apply, unitToPushforwardObjUnit_val_app_apply]` (leg 1) + `erw [pushforwardPushforwardAdj_counit_app_val_app]` (leg 2) + `rw [Scheme.Hom.appIso_hom]`; the two restriction maps `V→f⁻¹ᵁ(f''ᵁV)` agree by **`Subsingleton.elim`** (Opens poset homs proof-irrelevant); `rw [hops, CommRingCat.comp_apply]; rfl`. RHS pre-reduced to `(f.appIso V).hom` by `pushforwardBetaUnitEpsAppOne`. **(*) `pullbackUnit_sheafify_reconcile` (L1705) PARTIAL/HONEST:** transposed under sheaf `pullbackPushforwardAdjunction` (homEquiv injective), LHS fully reduced to `cuX.app 𝟙_X ≫ unitToPushforwardObjUnit φ` via `rw [homEquiv_naturality_left]; simp only [Functor.id_obj]; erw [pullbackPushforwardAdjunction_homEquiv_pullbackObjUnitToUnit]` (the **`erw` is load-bearing** — keyed `rw`/`show…from` fail on the `Scheme.Modules↔SheafOfModules.…(toRingCatSheafHom)` adjunction-spelling seam). Residual = RHS sheafification counit-slide mate-calculus, **EXACT shape of the proven `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq` `hA2` (L459+) specialised to 𝟙_X (~80-150 LOC) → ESCALATE (effort-breaker/mathlib-analogist), do NOT re-grind.** Both review subagents clear (auditor 0 must-fix/2 major STALE COMMENTS [L1146 cites now-closed `dual_restrict_iso_restrict_compat` "sorry"; L2329-2333 "BLOCKER/residual sorries" in executed sorry-free proof]/4 minor; lvb PASS, 2 minor = new helper untracked coverage debt + slightly stale RES1 ordering prose [flagged `% NOTE:` iter-101]).
- **(a) `dual_unit_iso_restrict_assemble` ASSEMBLED (iter-100): monolithic sorry → VERIFIED category-algebra assembly + 2 named residuals; TensorObjInverse sorry 2→3 (decomposition, NOT regression), EXIT 0 (8567 jobs), `gaps`=0.** Idiom: atomize the seam-crossing square into generic abstract-`[Category C]` outer/core assemblers (`unit_assemble` L1529, `hcore_assemble` L1542 — pure `Category.assoc`) applied to the concrete goal by **defeq-`refine`/`exact`** (crosses `SheafOfModules ≫` with no whnf bomb), plus term-mode seam facts `hnat`/`hsplit`/`hscp`/`hflank`. **DURABLE:** applying a presheaf equality `h` under `sheafification.map` — syntactic `rw [h]` CHOKES on the v4.31 `Sheaf.val` instances-transparency seam → use TERM mode `(congrArg (fun m => SY.map m) h).trans (Functor.map_comp …)`. The 2 open residuals BOTH collapse to ONE infra obligation, the **`leftAdjointUniq`/`homEquiv` unit-transpose carrier value** (H1 pullback↔pushforward at `𝟙_X`, sectionwise `= (f.appIso V).hom`): `forgetUnitRestrict_eq_pushforwardUnit` (RES1, L1566 — sectionwise-reduced, RHS discharged by `pushforwardBetaUnitEpsAppOne`) and `pullbackUnit_sheafify_reconcile` ((*), L1607 — now **unit-only**, no dual factor, strictly cleaner than iter-099's RES1/RES2). `restrictFunctorIsoPullback = restrictAdjunction.leftAdjointUniq pullbackPushforwardAdjunction`; `pullbackObjUnitToUnit = homEquiv.symm (unitToPushforwardObjUnit)`. Mathlib levers: `Adjunction.homEquiv_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app`, `unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app`; template `presheafDualUnitIso_naturality` (DualInverse:317). **NEXT = effort-breaker/infra lane on the carrier value — NOT a re-prove at the keystone (already assembled).** (c) `trivialisation_restrict_compat` (L2451) gated on (a) fully closing; sorry in v4.30 too. Both review subagents clear (auditor 0 crit/2 major stale-comments [L2254 already-executed BLOCKER note; L2723 docstring cites future iters 206/218/225/226]/2 minor; lvb 0 must-fix, MAJOR = keystone proof PROSE now stale [flagged `% NOTE:` iter-100] + 4-helper coverage debt).
- **TensorObjInverse dual cone 4→2 (iter-099): (b) `dualUnitIso_dualIsoOfIso` + (d) `exists_tensorObj_inverse` CLOSED, EXIT 0 (8565 jobs); (b) axiom-clean `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`.** The genuine blocker for (b)/(d) was a SILENT RECOVERY OMISSION, not difficulty: the v4.31 recovery (089/090) DROPPED `presheafDualUnitIso_naturality` (v4.30 `117100c4`:DualInverse:317) + `homOfLocalCompat_restrictFunctor_map` (DualInverse:779) + private `linearEndo_apply_comm` (DualInverse:209) from DualInverse to comment-only; the v4.30 bodies of (b)/(d) reference them → "Unknown identifier". **DURABLE: when a ported v4.30 body fails "Unknown identifier", grep the v4.30 parent `117100c4` — the recovery may have dropped the helper. Re-port it (private, local) before re-running** (prover can't edit DualInverse). **NEW v4.31 idiom (durable):** (d)'s `key` sub-proof — `rw [eqToHom_comp_iff]` chokes ("target not type-correct under `instances` transparency") on `(Over.forget).op ⋙ M.val.presheaf` ↔ `restrict` defeq + `Sheaf.val`↔`ObjectProperty.obj` deprecation; `Over.mk_left` no longer fires. FIX: build the naturality hyp `hnat` with the UNREDUCED `.left` spelling (so its `.app` index matches the goal), then apply in TERM mode `(eqToHom_comp_iff _ _ _).mpr hnat.symm` (defeq-tolerant) — NOT a syntactic `rw`. Same family as the RES1/RES2 obstacle in (a): every syntactic `rw`/`erw` of a category lemma here chokes; term-mode `exact` is the only lane. **(a) `dual_unit_iso_restrict_assemble` PARTIAL — L1′ wired (added `import …PresheafDualUnitPullback`, only adds the already-imported monster), iter-085 "p does NOT exist" blocker corrected OBSOLETE (`p = presheafPullbackUnitIso`, `q = presheafPushforwardUnitIso`, L1′ proven 098); residual = two sheaf↔presheaf reconciliations RES1 (dual flank) + RES2 (pullback flank), themselves real sub-lemmas (effort-break material). Close via STEP-B generic-assemble (term-mode `have`s + `exact` on a generic single-`[Category]` lemma).** (c) `trivialisation_restrict_compat` gated on (a)/S4a — was sorry in v4.30 too, NOT a regression; do not dispatch before (a) lands. **LSP DEAD on the monster-importing main file (broken-pipe) — develop in a throwaway scratch importing only DualInverse, `lake env lean` ~30-60 s loop.** Both review subagents clear (lvb PASS/0 must-fix; auditor structurally sound, MAJOR = 3 re-ports wrong-home → restore upstream in DualInverse via refactor + fix stale cross-refs in `PresheafDualUnitPullback.lean` L221/L267). The 3 re-ports are `private` → same `#print axioms`-on-qualified-name "Unknown constant" sync gap as iter-096.
- **DUAL-UNIT FLANK CLOSED (iter-098): `PresheafDualUnitPullback.lean` GREEN, sorry-free, axiom-clean `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`, EXIT 0 (8565 jobs).** This is the genuine open math churned 085–087 — the sole `dag-query gaps` ∞-source, now 0. Three steps: STEP 0 recovered 6 v4.31 α-NatTrans sites (axis-#1, `naturality := fun _ _ i => f.appIso_inv_naturality i`) — the leaf had NEVER been rebuilt post-bump and grep's 1-sorry count masked the 6 errors; **the planner caught it by actually BUILDING (host is 2 TB RAM; the "leaf OOMs → don't build" rule was a STALE-HOST MYTH — retire it permanently).** STEP 1 authored linchpin `pushforwardBetaUnitEpsAppOne`; STEP 2 closed the L1′ FLANK `presheafDualUnitIso_pullback_natural`. **KEYSTONE RECIPE (both flank comparators collapse to the SAME `(f.appIso V).hom`):** sectionwise `hom_ext/ModuleCat.hom_ext/LinearMap.ext`; `erw [sliceDualTransport_app_apply]`; LHS outer via `dualUnitRingSwap_apply`, RHS outer via the linchpin (carrier value of `q.hom = (f.appIso V).hom`); `congr 1` strips the common map; residual `PUSH=1` via `pushforward_map_app_apply` + `presheafPushforwardUnitIso_inv_app` + `map_one`; `rfl`. Iso-level goal closes by an `H1.hom.naturality` telescope (`Iso.inv_comp_eq`, `Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc`; keep `hadj`/`H1` as `letI` NOT `have` so the unfolds stay defeq for a `change` fold). **CARRIER-DIAMOND RECIPES (durable):** (a) `comp_ε`/`comp_η` will NOT fire on mathlib `pushforward β` (right-assoc intermediate base has no synthesizable `MonoidalCategory`) → `show` the functor as the explicit LEFT-associated `pushforward₀OfCommRingCat … ⋙ restrictScalars (whiskerRight α (forget₂))`, then `erw [comp_ε]` fires. (b) `(restrictScalars …).map (ε pushforward₀) = 𝟙` via `CategoryTheory.Functor.map_id` — NOT bare `Functor.map_id` (resolves to the MONAD `Functor`). (c) `restrictScalars_η` can't synth `CommRing` in the concrete post-`forget₂` Scheme spelling (exposes only `Ring`) → factor through an abstract `{R S : Cᵒᵖ ⥤ CommRingCat}` helper (`restrictScalars_laxMonoidal_ε_app`) where `CommRing` is native. (d) `set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false` on `presheafPushforwardUnitIso_inv_app`; apply value lemmas WITHOUT an explicit `1` literal (OfNat) then `erw [map_one]`. **Both review subagents clear (0 must-fix).** Downstream `TensorObjInverse` dual cone (4 sorries) RIDES this leaf — co-dispatch next iter (race now cleared, upstream frozen).
- **v4.31.0 migration: S2 `tensorObj_restrict_iso_restrict_compat` CLOSED IN PLACE (iter-096), sorry 5→4, EXIT 0 (8565 jobs), axiom-clean `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]` (no `sorryAx`). The HARD watch (3rd-deferral STUCK gate) is satisfied — and the "S2 OOMs in place" caution is DISPROVED: the filled 6.4M-HB proof builds in the TensorObjInverse context with NO Exit 137.** The verbatim v4.30 body (`117100c4`:TensorObjInverse:1028–1078) needed **THREE v4.31 transparency fixes** (the recipe predicted 0–1) — all instances of ONE recurring axis: **the `⋙`-spelled object `(pullback U.ι ⋙ pullback j).obj X` vs the nested `(pullback j).obj ((pullback U.ι).obj X)` are defeq but NOT syntactic under v4.31 `instances` transparency**, which poisons `rw` motives, `congr`, and `simp`-lemma matching. The three fixes: (1) `rw [pullbackTensorMap_restrict_cancel_assoc …]` → ill-typed motive (`⋙` vs nested domain) ⇒ replace with `refine Eq.trans (pullbackTensorMap_restrict_cancel_assoc j U.ι M N _) ?_` (metavariable unification crosses the seam, no motive abstraction); (2) the `@[reassoc]` cancel lemma left the LHS head left-bracketed and `simp only [Category.assoc]` did NOT flatten it ⇒ an explicit `rw [Category.assoc]` FIRST exposes the shared leading `(pullback j).map (pullbackTensorMap U.ι M N)` so `congr 1` cancels cleanly (otherwise `congr 1` matches the big left group vs the single map → spurious HEq subgoals); (3) `simp only [tensorObjIsoOfIso_hom]` made no progress because `(pullbackComp j U.ι).app` carries the COMPOSED `⋙`-obj spelling while `pullbackTensorMap j` yields the NESTED ⇒ prepend `simp only [Functor.comp_obj, …]` to normalize composed→nested. The `tensorObj_functoriality_comp3` `refine Eq.trans …` seam-crossing tail and `restrictFunctorIsoPullback_comp_compat_leg` legs fired verbatim. **DURABLE: when a v4.31 `rw`/`congr`/`simp` "did not find pattern" / "no progress" / "made no progress" on a pullback composite, suspect the `⋙`-vs-nested-`obj` seam — cross it with `refine Eq.trans`/unification or pre-normalize via `Functor.comp_obj`, NOT by restructuring the proof.** Both review subagents confirm GENUINE (auditor `iter096` 0 crit/2 major stale-comments/2 minor; lvb `tensorobjinverse-iter096` PASS, 0 must-fix). **Marker note:** S2 is `private` → `sync_leanok` could not resolve the non-private `\lean{}` name (the prover's own `#print axioms` on the qualified name returned "Unknown constant"; it resolves only as `_private…`), so it added 0; the review MANUALLY added the proof-block `\leanok` (build-verified end-to-end closed, axiom-clean). Same private-decl sync gap will recur for the remaining private FLANK/terminal decls.
- **v4.31.0 migration: K1 `pullbackTensorMap_isIso_of_isOpenImmersion` CLOSED in a NEW leaf (iter-095), sorry 1→0, EXIT 0 (8563 jobs, ~13s), axiom-clean.** The OOM-isolation leaf-split hypothesis (iter-094 plan) is CONFIRMED: K1 was relocated (iter-095 refactor) into `TensorObjSubstrate/PullbackTensorMapIso.lean` — a thin leaf importing ONLY `TensorObjSubstrate` (monster-free; does NOT import the 12.8M-HB `PresheafDualPullback`). The verbatim v4.30 body (`117100c4`:TensorObjSubstrate:4790) then elaborated in ~13s with **NO Exit 137** — proving the 6.4M-HB OOM hazard was the *in-place TensorObjInverse context* (which imports the monster), never K1's own proof. **DURABLE RULE:** to fill a heavy decl OOM-safe, move it into a NEW leaf importing only its non-monster upstream — REQUIRES the decl's deps be PUBLIC there (K1's 3 deps `isIso_pullbackTensorMap_of_isIso_sheafifyDelta` / `pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse` / `isIso_oplaxδ_of_conj` are all public in TensorObjSubstrate; S2 does NOT qualify — its deps are `private` in TensorObjInverse, so S2 fills in-place). **Only ONE v4.31 fix needed** (verbatim otherwise): axis-#1 NatTrans naturality autoparam — `let α := { app := fun U => (f.appIso U.unop).inv }` failed `could not synthesize default value for field 'naturality'` → supply `naturality := fun _ _ i => f.appIso_inv_naturality i` column-aligned to `app`. This axis now recurs at 3 confirmed sites (TensorObjInverse:727, PresheafDualPullback:319, PullbackTensorMapIso:33) — apply pre-emptively to any ported `{ app := ... }`-only NatTrans literal. Second validation (after B1) that iter-093's ROOT δ/η re-port is faithful: the keystone calls compiled as-is. Both auditor (CLEAN) + lvb (PASS) confirm GENUINE; file relocation needs no `\lean{}` change (decl name unchanged).
- **v4.31.0 migration: TensorObjInverse.lean (iter-094) — B1 CLOSED, sorry 7→6, EXIT 0 (8565 jobs); the iter-093 ROOT re-port is VALIDATED in its primary consumer.** B1 `tensorObj_restrict_iso_eq_pullbackTensorMap` (L809, private) was WALLED iter-092 *only* on the then-deleted `pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse`; with that keystone re-ported (iter-093, `TensorObjSubstrate:4544`), the **verbatim v4.30 body** (`117100c4`:TensorObjInverse:843–893) compiled with **ZERO v4.31 fixes** — the `erw` spots (`Iso.inv_hom_id_app_assoc`, `Functor.map_comp`, `H1inv_app_eq_pullbackVal_restrict`) + `exact map_tensorHom_comp3` tail all fired as-is; the 9-axis reminders did not apply. Both auditor + lvb confirm B1 GENUINE (no cheat). B1's own body is sorry-free; it transitively rides K1's `sorryAx` (`pullbackTensorMap_isIso_of_isOpenImmersion`, L806, still `sorry`) via the `haveI` IsIso witness — expected, clears when K1 fills. **DURABLE MARKER FACT (corrects a recurring lvb false-positive):** a `\leanok` placed on a lemma's **statement block** (immediately after `\begin{lemma}`, before the title/`\label`/`\lean`) means "declaration is formalized, ≥ a sorry present" and is CORRECT on a still-`sorry` decl (e.g. K1, S2); only a `\leanok` on the **proof block** (after `\begin{proof}`) asserts the proof is closed. lvb flagged K1/S2 statement-block `\leanok` as laundering — it is NOT; verified the K1/S2 proof blocks carry no `\leanok`, and the deterministic sync correctly left them (±0).
